title: New Figure of Qs version of Eva 02
display_title: New Figure of Qs version of Eva 02
wikitext:
[]: New Figure of Q's version of Eva 02             Quote Post by gordanham » Sat Jul 28, 2012 11:53 pm New from Wonder Festival You got unit 02: http://myfigurecollection.net/item/118023

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Jul 28, 2012 11:57 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Sun Jul 29, 2012 12:02 am Looks mislabeled. The face is the same as the Cyborg Unit 02. Looks like the unpainted sculpt. (Also looks like it'll be going on sale near my birthday.)

[]:             Quote Post by gordanham » Sun Jul 29, 2012 12:10 am Brainman wrote: Looks mislabeled. The face is the same as the Cyborg Unit 02. Looks like the unpainted sculpt. (Also looks like it'll be going on sale near my birthday.)

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sun Jul 29, 2012 12:14 am Yeah, that unpainted figure is definitely EVA-02' β. It even has that shield thingy that was shown in the 15-sec preview seen at the end of the NTV airing of Evangelion 2.0 a while back.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Sun Jul 29, 2012 5:52 am Damn it, I was hoping that shield thing would be a Spear of Longinus in disguise.

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Sun Jul 29, 2012 6:16 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: Unit-00? Really? No. Just... no. It's eaten, it's gone. It has ceased to be. This is an ex-Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Tue Jul 31, 2012 11:45 pm SPOILER: Show
